name: Seth Dichard Golf Centers
about: Seth Dichard Golf Centers is a state-of-the-art indoor golf facility located in Hudson, NH. The venue features seven top-of-the-line indoor golf simulators, two private teaching bays, and a professional club fitting and repair shop, providing a comprehensive golf experience regardless of weather conditions. It offers a variety of services including simulator rentals, private and group lessons, junior and adult golf programs, indoor leagues, tournaments, and club fitting, making it suitable for players of all skill levels. The facility is led by Seth Dichard, a PGA professional with over 20 years of teaching experience and a reputation for helping students reach their full potential in the game.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor access with no weather limitations
Comprehensive services from lessons to club fitting and leagues

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available. It's recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the facility for details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service or policies regarding outside items.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website mentions minimum rental times of 60 minutes for simulator packages, but does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers specific indoor junior programs, making it suitable for young golfers.
